title: Ubiquiti UA-Rescue - UniFi Access Rescue KeySwitch
description: UniFi Access Rescue KeySwitch is a single pole dual throw manual KeySwitch designed to work with the UniFi Access system. In the event of a system malfunction, the UA-Rescue KeySwitch allows for a user to manually unlock any door controlled by the UniFi Access Hub. Compatible with both Fail Safe and Fail Secure lock systems, the UniFi Access Rescue KeySwitch is an integral part of any robust Door Access solution Emergency key relay switch Two included Keys Compatible with both Fail Safe and Fail Secure lock systems Lock Lock cap Screws (2) key
